metrics.top_terms: layer, this, entropy, s_eff, s_prod, product, lean, what, factors, ПҮ_local, definition, coherence, factor, structural, antitone

sections.title: Layer 1 вҖ” The Formal Layer (Definition 10 + 11)
sections.text:
**The Mathematical Spine. Locked.**
**POF 2828 | May 2, 2026 | Lean-verified at: D:\theophysics_lean_production_audit_run\CorrectedEntropyKernel.lean**
---

sections.title: What This Layer Is
sections.text:
This is the typed, formal mathematical specification of the Master Equation. It contains no theology, no physical-law names, no spiritual pairings. It is the **ontology of factors** вҖ” what each variable is, what set it lives in, and what algebraic role it plays.
This layer is the source of truth. Everything else (physical interpretations, spiritual interpretations, teaching organization) must reduce to or be consistent with this.
---

sections.title: The Ten Factors (Definition 10)
sections.text:
| # | Symbol | Domain | Formal Definition |
|---|--------|--------|-------------------|
| 1 | G | в„қвүҘ0 | External negentropy influx rate |
| 2 | M | [-1, 1] | Alignment cosine between system state vector and reference vector |
| 3 | E | в„қвүҘ0 | Signal propagation fidelity (channel capacity) |
| 4 | S_prod | в„қвүҘ0 | Entropy production rate (raw disorder accumulation) |
| 5 | T | в„қ>0 | Temporal integration parameter |
| 6 | K | в„қвүҘ0 | Information compression ratio (Kolmogorov complexity) |
| 7 | R | {0, 1} | Phase transition indicator (irreversible state change) |
| 8 | Q | [0, 1] | Superposition measure (unresolved state space) |
| 9 | F | [0, 1] | Non-local correlation strength (entanglement measure) |
| 10 | C | [0, 1] | Total integration measure (global coherence) |
---

sections.title: The Entropy Sign Repair
sections.text: Raw entropy production must not multiply coherence directly. Higher entropy вҶ’ less coherence, not more.

sections.title: Effective Entropy Factor
sections.text:
```
S_eff(x, t) = e^(-О· В· S_prod(x, t))
```
Or equivalently (when working in domains where the exponential is awkward):
```
S_eff(x, t) = 1 / (1 + S_prod(x, t))
```
Both forms map S_prod вҲҲ в„қвүҘ0 вҶ’ S_eff вҲҲ (0, 1].

sections.title: The structural property that matters and is now Lean-verified:
sections.text:
> **S_eff is antitone in S_prod.**
> Higher entropy production strictly reduces effective entropy contribution to ПҮ.
The specific analytic form (exponential vs. rational) requires Mathlib for full verification but is structurally interchangeable inside the product.
---

sections.title: The Master Equation (Definition 11, corrected)
sections.text:
### Local form
```
ПҮ_local(x, t) = G(x, t) В· M(x, t) В· E(x, t) В· S_eff(x, t) В· T(x, t)
В· K(x, t) В· R(x, t) В· Q(x, t) В· F(x, t) В· C(x, t)
```

sections.title: Integral form
sections.text:
```
ПҮ_total = вҲ«_{tвӮҖ}^{tвӮҒ} вҲ«_О©
G(x,t) В· M(x,t) В· E(x,t) В· S_eff(x,t) В· T(x,t)
В· K(x,t) В· R(x,t) В· Q(x,t) В· F(x,t) В· C(x,t)
dВіx dt
```
---

sections.title: Critical Distinction: C vs ПҮ
sections.text:
**C is the tenth factor.** It measures total integration / global coherence as a local quantity.
**ПҮ is the integrated output.** It is what you get when you integrate the product of all ten factors over a region and time interval.
They are not the same thing. The product never includes ПҮ вҖ” that would be self-referential.
```
C вҲҲ [0, 1] is a factor inside the product
ПҮ вҲҲ в„қвүҘ0 is the result of integrating the product
```
This distinction is now structural in the Lean kernel.
---

sections.title: Verified Structural Properties (Lean 4)
sections.text:
The companion kernel `CorrectedEntropyKernel.lean` formally proves:
1. **Antitone entropy.** `S_eff` is antitone in `S_prod`. More entropy вҶ’ less coherence contribution.
2. **Zero collapse on numeric factors.** If any of G, M, E, T, K, Q, F, C is zero, then `ПҮ_local = 0`.
3. **Zero collapse on phase gate.** If R = 0 (no phase transition), then `ПҮ_local = 0`.
4. **Strict positivity.** If all numeric factors are positive AND R = 1, then `ПҮ_local > 0`.
5. **Frozen-slice monotonicity (constructive direction).** ПҮ_local is monotone increasing in G, E, T, K, F, C.
6. **Frozen-slice antitone (destructive direction).** ПҮ_local is antitone in S_prod through S_eff.
7. **C-as-factor / ПҮ-as-output structural distinction.** C appears in the factor-slot list; ПҮ is defined as the output of the product.
---

sections.title: What Is Not Yet Verified
sections.text:
Honest about the limits of the current Lean kernel:
- The **specific analytic form** S_eff = e^(-О· В· S_prod) is not yet proved вҖ” promotes when the project gets a Mathlib backing
- **Pointwise theorems** tying `FactorFunctions.at(x, t)` directly to slice lemmas are pending
- **Reconciliation** with the older production kernel (which treats C as a Lindblad operator) is pending вҖ” both views are valid in different layers
---

sections.title: The No-Drift Rule for This Layer
sections.text:
Anyone working at this layer must obey:
1. The ten factors are non-negotiable. None may be added, removed, renamed, or merged.
2. The domains (в„қвүҘ0, [-1,1], {0,1}, etc.) are non-negotiable.
3. S enters the product as S_eff, not as S_prod directly.
4. C is a factor. ПҮ is the output. Never confuse them.
5. The product is over ten factor slots. Always ten. Always those ten.
If any document at the teaching layer or the public layer contradicts this, **this layer wins.**
---
*Source: NODRIFT_LOSSLESS_v24.yaml + Definition 10/11 corrected with entropy sign repair*
*Lean verification: D:\theophysics_lean_production_audit_run\CorrectedEntropyKernel.lean*
*Status: STRUCTURAL CANONICAL вҖ” typed, verified, locked at this layer*
